descriptions.spacing-xxs: Alias: Spacing/0․5 (2px). Hairline spacing for tight UI adjustments.
descriptions.spacing-xs: Alias: Spacing/1 (4px). Minimal spacing inside dense components.
descriptions.spacing-sm: Alias: Spacing/1․5 (6px). Tight spacing for compact controls.
descriptions.spacing-lg: Alias: Spacing/3 (12px). Default gap inside small component groups.
descriptions.spacing-xl: Alias: Spacing/4 (16px). Standard mobile padding and common UI gap.
descriptions.spacing-2xl: Alias: Spacing/5 (20px). Spacious gap for grouped items.
descriptions.spacing-3xl: Alias: Spacing/6 (24px). Tablet container padding and section inner spacing.
descriptions.spacing-4xl: Alias: Spacing/8 (32px). Desktop container padding and large component gap.
descriptions.spacing-11xl: Alias: Spacing/40 (160px). Extra large layout spacing.

descriptions.text/text-inverse: Text on dark or colored surfaces.
descriptions.text/text-on-brand: Dark text on strong brand fill.

descriptions.foreground/fg-inverse: Icons on dark or inverted surfaces.
descriptions.background/bg-surface: Default raised surface: cards, inputs, modals, sidebars.
descriptions.background/bg-float: Floating surfaces above regular surfaces: dropdowns, popovers, tooltips.
descriptions.background/bg-muted: Recessed zones: code blocks, wells, table fill.
descriptions.background/bg-inverse: Inverted dark surface on light theme.

descriptions.Stack/tight: Dense vertical gap for tightly related elements. Alias: spacing-xs.
descriptions.Stack/text: Vertical rhythm for text blocks. Alias: spacing-lg.
descriptions.Stack/default: Default vertical gap for component internals. Alias: spacing-xl.
descriptions.Stack/group: Vertical gap between related component groups. Alias: spacing-3xl.
descriptions.Inline/tight: Dense horizontal gap for tightly paired items. Alias: spacing-md.
descriptions.Inline/default: Default horizontal gap for inline groups. Alias: spacing-lg.
descriptions.Inline/group: Horizontal gap for grouped inline actions. Alias: spacing-xl.
descriptions.Container/padding: Desktop horizontal container padding. Alias: spacing-4xl.
